completion_summary: Upgraded the live-LLM protocol and prompt contract to causally isolate the assigned-versus-masked spectral ablation. Pure UV-Vis/IR/NMR/HPLC/GC packets are removed; composite final-assay packets recursively remove spectra, channels, peaks, assignments, and spectral axes while retaining mass balance, endpoint metrics, costs, constraints, budgets, and other non-spectral public evidence. Added a differential regression test and audit gate. Official DeepSeek documentation was checked on 2026-07-12 and confirms V4 Pro/Flash, high/max thinking effort, JSON output, and the frozen prices; no local credential exists, so no real-model claim was made. Twenty-three related tests plus Ruff/mypy pass; architecture remains controls-ready and formal-evidence-incomplete.
notes: Redact only spectral/chromatographic raw content and assignments while preserving non-spectral observations, constraints, budgets, costs, and composite final-assay diagnostics. Continue excluding provider private reasoning_content.
scope: Make the paired live-LLM spectrum ablation causally identifiable by removing spectral information without deleting non-spectral public evidence, and bind the differential control to the audit report
